title: Upgrade The End
description: Do you think End need an update ?
body:
### THIS MOD IS IN BETA !!!

# What is this mod ?

### Do you think the End need an Update ? This mod will add the features that the End needs

### **New in this mod :**

**New End Stone Bricks Version :**

- Unbreakable
- Cracked (require at least a diamond pickaxe to destroy it)

**Aethium** :
- Fragment
- Nugget (craft with 9 Aethium Fragment)
- Ingot (smelt an Aethium Nugget)
- Weapons : Pickaxe, Axe, Sword, Shovel, Hoe (use a smething table with one Aethium Ingot, one Netherite Weapon and one Upgrade Smithing Template)
- Ore (only find in the End and give between 0 and 2 Aethium Fragment without fortune enchant)
- Block (craft avec 9 Aethium Ingot)

**Heart of the End** (available soon in survival mode) :
- Block
- Item (break a Block of Heart of the End)
- Weapons :  Pickaxe (a right click on a Unbreakable End Stone Brick transform it into a Cracked End Stone Brick), Axe, Sword, Shovel, Hoe(= fortune 3 included) (use a smething table with one heart of the End, one Aethium Weapon and one Upgrade Smithing Template, and have infinite durability)

**Structure :**

- Ender Ruines (normal or lucky)
-
